ComponentType: Single-Cell Lithium-Ion Battery Linear Charger IC
Description: The TP4056 is a complete constant-current/constant-voltage linear charger for single-cell lithium-ion batteries. It integrates a power MOSFET, reverse-blocking diode, and current sense resistor, requiring minimal external components. It features programmable charge current up to 1A, a fixed 4.2V float voltage, and automatic charge termination when the current drops to 1/10 of the set value. Additional functions include thermal regulation, battery temperature monitoring, under-voltage lockout, automatic recharge, and status indication via two open-drain outputs.

KeyParameters.**Programmable Charge Current**: Up to 1000 mA (set via external resistor R_PROG)
KeyParameters.**Battery End-of-Charge Termination Thre: C/10 (Charge current falls to 1/10 of programmed value)
KeyParameters.**Trickle Charge Current**: Programmable as 1/10 of the full-scale current (e.g., 100 mA for 1A setting)
KeyParameters.**Thermal Regulation**: Yes, reduces charge current to limit die temperature

Functions.FunctionDescription: Battery Temperature Sense Input. Connect to NTC thermistor network or ground to disable.
Constant-Charge Current Set and Charge Enable. Connect a resistor (R_PROG) to GND to set charge current. Floating this pin disables charging.
Positive Input Supply Voltage (4.0V to 6.5V). Powers the internal circuitry.
Battery Connection. Connects to the positive terminal of the single-cell Li-ion battery. Provides charge current and voltage regulation.
Charge Complete Status Output (Open-Drain). Pulled low when charging is complete and battery voltage is within the float voltage window; otherwise high impedance.
Charge Status Output (Open-Drain). Pulled low when the device is in constant-current or constant-voltage charging mode; otherwise high impedance.
Chip Enable Input (Active High). A logic high enables the charger; a logic low places the IC in shutdown mode. Can be tied to VCC if unused.
